verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.28.1 commit containing persistent maintenance demands, real repair tasks, target-tool and material reservations, repair labor and explicit failures, repair resource-flow accounting, daily reconciliation, long-run conservation checks, precise failed-load rollback for active repair tasks and deterministic-fingerprint compatibility; later tests, documentation and this manifest commit follow it.
